title: Unencrypted traffic across trust boundary
mitigations: Use TLS1.2+; enable HSTS; certificate pinning for mobile; disable weak ciphers

title: Public API without authentication
mitigations: Require OAuth2/OIDC; API keys with rotation; mTLS for service-to-service

title: Weak or missing authorization (RBAC/ABAC)
mitigations: Enforce RBAC/ABAC; least privilege; deny-by-default; centralized authz checks

title: Input validation/injection risk
mitigations: Allowlist validation; parameterized queries; ORM; output encoding; WAF rules

title: Missing tamper-evident logging / audit trail
mitigations: Structured append-only logs; centralized log management; signed logs; time sync

title: Sensitive data at rest not encrypted
mitigations: Encrypt at rest (AES‑256); use KMS/HSM; key rotation; access control on keys

title: Lack of rate limiting / brute-force protection
mitigations: Per-IP/user rate limit; CAPTCHA; exponential backoff; WAF throttling

title: CSRF on state-changing endpoints
mitigations: Synchronizer token pattern; SameSite=strict cookies; double-submit; check Origin

title: Unrestricted file upload
mitigations: Allowlist MIME; size caps; virus scan; store outside web root; signed URLs

title: IDOR (Insecure Direct Object Reference)
mitigations: Enforce per-object authorization checks; use opaque IDs; test with fuzzers

title: Insecure deserialization / unsafe unmarshalling
mitigations: Use JSON with strict schema; disable polymorphic types; allowlist serializers

title: Directory traversal / path injection
mitigations: Normalize & resolve paths; disallow '../'; chroot/jail; least-privileged FS perms

title: SSRF (Server-Side Request Forgery)
mitigations: Allowlist destinations; block link-local/IMDS; egress proxy; DNS pinning

title: Open administrative interface
mitigations: Network ACLs; admin behind VPN; MFA; disable default creds

title: Insufficient secrets management
mitigations: Use secret manager (AWS Secrets Manager/HashiCorp Vault); rotate; restrict scope
